name: omp-subagent-preview
description: Live cmux browser dashboard for OMP subagent trajectories

scripts.check: bun run build:runtime && bun test tests/*.test.ts && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent/task --external @oh-my-pi/pi-ai --outdir /tmp/omp-subagent-preview-check
